chunks.title: Jeremiah's Complaint and God's Answer
chunks.reason: A unified dialogue where Jeremiah questions God about the prosperity of the wicked and receives a challenge to persevere.

chunks.title: Judgment on Judah's Vineyard
chunks.reason: God describes the desolation of His inheritance and the judgment coming upon the land due to its evil.

chunks.title: Promise Regarding Neighboring Nations
chunks.reason: A specific prophecy concerning the fate of Israel's neighbors and their potential restoration or destruction.
